name: luv-js
description: Modular agentic framework — pure-TS JS bindings (browser + Node + Bun)

scripts.build:bundle: bun build src/index.ts src/middleware/index.ts src/mcp/index.ts --outdir=dist --target=browser --format=esm --root=src --external node:*
scripts.build: bun run build:bundle && bun run build:types
scripts.example:server: bun run build && bun --env-file=../../.env run examples/server.ts
